meaning: 圣伊莱斯(7世纪在法兰西的希腊隐士,残疾人、乞丐和被社会遗弃者的主保圣人)
examples: Mr. Giles pleads ignorance as his excuse.
The original iron boxes with the round roofs first appeared in 1926. They were designed by Giles Gilbert Scott, the architect of the Battersea Power Station in London.
In Giles County, Virginia, the school board has removed displays of the Ten Commandments from its schools.
The funeral service with full military honours took place at St Giles Church, Wrexham.
England and Wales Cricket Board chairman Giles Clarke feels a resolution needs to found.
